title: French Vegetarian Gratin
description: A creamy, comforting gratin made with thinly sliced veggies and topped with a crunchy breadcrumb mixture.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss together tofu, onion, and mushroom.
In a separate bowl, mix together flour and a pinch of salt.
Add the flour mixture to the tofu mixture and toss to coat.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and dot the top with butter.
Sprinkle the gratin cheese blend over the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the top is golden brown and the cheese is melted.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped thyme.
